query:
SELECT id AS "id!: Uuid",
                      project_id AS "project_id!: Uuid",
                      title,
                      pinned AS "pinned!: bool",
                      executor,
                      created_at AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                      updated_at AS "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
               FROM chat_sessions
               WHERE project_id = $1
               ORDER BY pinned DESC, updated_at DESC
